scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run sync:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run sync:web && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:open:ios: npm run sync:web && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run sync:web && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:assemble:debug: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:lint: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew lintRelease
